items.title: Why do people want Notre Dame to wear gold hooker pants?
items.summary: It’s June, so obviously one of our favorite offseason topics concerns the aesthetic of the Notre Dame Football program. Yes… it’s GOLD PANTS time. I’m pretty sure if you’ve listened to the podcast over the years, you already know my absolute belief that the current gold pants are the best version of what the Irish […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: The Irish must REALLY want linebacker Amarri Irvin
items.summary: Marcus Freeman has been an incredible recruiter for the Fighting Irish ever since he stepped onto Notre Dame’s campus. In fact, the entire football recruiting operation at Notre Dame is on an entirely different level than what we have seen in the past. One of the many reasons for all of this is because of […]

items.title: How many eyeballs will see Notre Dame on the road this season?
items.summary: Notre Dame will go on the road six times during the 2027 college football season. We all know that (at least on paper) Notre Dame’s schedule isn’t filled with a number of tough games. Perhaps the greatest criticism of Notre Dame’s schedule could be that they only have four true road games, while two others […]

items.title: Notre Dame’s Leonard Moore is on the new EA Sports CFB 27 cover
items.summary: In July, EA Sports will be releasing this year’s version of the wildly popular College Football video game. It’s been nice to have the game back in the rotation over the last few years after a decade hiatus due to… well, legal reasons I guess. The new version of the game now allows for the […]

items.title: Two Irish Legends Among Nominees for the 2027 College Football Hall of Fame Class
items.summary: The National Football Foundation announced the 2027 College Football Hall of Fame ballot this week, and among the 80 FBS players under consideration are two names that should be very familiar to Notre Dame fans: Luther Bradley and Manti Te’o. Considering that more than 5.8 million people have played college football since the first intercollegiate […]

items.title: Notre Dame’s Manti Te’o and Luther Bradley are on the CFB Hall of Fame ballot
items.summary: From the NFF press release: IRVING, Texas (June 1, 2026) – The National Football Foundation (NFF) announced today the names on the 2027 Ballot under consideration for induction into the NFF College Football Hall of Fame. The 2027 ballot includes 80 players and nine coaches from the NCAA Football Bowl Subdivision and 99 players and 39 […]

items.title: TRIPLE THREAT: Nolan James, Boubacar Traore, and Jasper Scaife
items.summary: Everyone loves to do a player countdown for Notre Dame as we face toward the college football season, but in all fairness, the offseason is much shorter than you think. It’s really only two months in the grand scheme of things, and there will be much more to talk about in the middle of July […]

items.title: Notre Dame should add more Big 12 flavor to its schedule
items.summary: The Notre Dame Football schedule is a thing of beauty — but also an absolute nightmare. I’ve always loved the mix of schools from around the country, but some years it can feel a little stale. I think there’s an easy way to throw a little more flavor onto this meat, and you already know […]

items.title: Notre Dame and Texas Tech… yeah go ahead and schedule that football game
items.summary: Joey McGuire and Texas Tech got back in the Notre Dame conversation again this week after news about there being a possibility the Texas Longhorns may not end up playing the Irish in their scheduled games.
